privileged_info_summary: The task modifies the real public-domain eCRM-001 (eVTOL Common Reference Model 001) OpenVSP aircraft design model from Uber Elevate/ESAero. The engineering specifications for the lift boom are synthetically generated and explicitly provided to the agent in boom_spec.txt. It has been verified that the expected boom dimensions (length 14.0, diameter 1.0) and spatial coordinates (x=12.0, y=8.5, z=0.8) exactly match the task constraints and evaluation logic in verifier.py.
